title: avenula praetutiana subsp. rigida
intro: Avenula praetutiana subsp. rigida, also known as a subspecies of the Italian oat grass, is a perennial grass native to central and southern Europe. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Avenula praetutiana subsp. rigida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
